summary: Example response for listing news articles from Commerce.gov API

data.title: Commerce Department Announces New Trade Partnership
data.body: The U.S. Department of Commerce announced today a new trade partnership initiative...
data.summary: The Commerce Department announced a new bilateral trade partnership to expand U.S. exports.

data.title: Census Bureau Releases 2025 Population Estimates
data.body: The U.S. Census Bureau today released its annual population estimates...
data.summary: The Census Bureau released updated population estimates showing continued growth in Sunbelt states.

data.title: NOAA Issues Spring Outlook for Flooding Risk
data.body: The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration issued its spring outlook...
data.summary: NOAA's Spring Outlook indicates above-normal flood risk in the Mississippi River basin.
